mews.title: Mews PMS & Omniboost Integration
mews.description: Covers everything about Mews and the Omniboost integration: Bronze/Silver/Gold tiers, accounting flows (Consumed, Closed, Hybrid), GL mapping, onboarding steps, POS connections, receivable tracking, and all supported systems.

omniboost.title: Omniboost Platform & Products
omniboost.description: Covers what Omniboost is, its five core products (Accounting, PMS, POS, Insights, Owners Portal), how it connects hospitality systems, and the industries and business types it serves.
